notes: Immortal 1.50 — merges upstream 1.44–1.49 (full phone web remote / PWA with media + touchpad, declarative settings registry driving remote control, home-screen widget host + free-placement grid + wallpapers, screensaver Ken Burns motion & EXIF captions, fleet management, Music Assistant multi-room port/auth fix) into the @GodricTM feature fork (ISS, aurora, sunrise, lamp, kitchen timers, room ping, chimes, external Sherpa/Kokoro/Romanian TTS voices, system-wide touch & keypress sounds and more).
